metadata.title: Thai White Rice 5% Broken Exporters for China Market
metadata.description: Shortlisted Thai rice exporters capable of supplying 200,000 MT Thai White Rice 5% Broken for export to China. RFL standard spec (matches Thai Rice Standard).

email_verification_notes.action_required: Review inferred emails before dispatch. Verify GACC registration for China rice export with each vendor.

companies.name_th: ซีพี อินเตอร์เทรด จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Email from ZoomInfo/Panjiva records. CP Intertrade is Royal Umbrella brand. Check cpthairice.com/contact-us-now/ for current export sales email.
companies.product_summary: Royal Umbrella brand. Thailand's largest rice exporter. Jasmine, white rice, parboiled. Exports to 100+ countries including China.
companies.notes: CP Group subsidiary. Largest Thai rice exporter. Deep China ties through CP Group operations.

companies.name_th: แคปปิตอล ไรซ์ จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Export email confirmed via STC Group website and Asian-links directory
companies.product_summary: Major white rice exporter. Specializes in Thai White Rice 5%, 10%, 25%. Part of STC Group.
companies.notes: Known for competitive pricing on white rice grades. Significant volume to China market.

companies.name_th: โอแลม อะกริ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Email from official Olam Agri website contact page
companies.product_summary: Global commodity trader. Thai White Rice 5%, Hom Mali, Parboiled. State-of-the-art processing facility on Chao Phraya River.
companies.notes: Part of Olam International (Singapore). Global trading desk with established China operations.

companies.name_th: เอเชีย โกลเด้น ไรซ์ จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Inferred from domain. Check asiagoldenrice.com/contact-us for confirmed email. ZoomInfo shows w***@asiagoldenrice.com for manager.
companies.product_summary: Established 1999. Thai Hom Mali, White Rice 5%, Jasmine. TREA member.
companies.notes: Leading Thai rice exporter since 1999. Factory in Chachoengsao. Exports to China and Middle East.

companies.name_th: เอ็กเซล ไรซ์ แอนด์ โปรดักส์ จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Both emails confirmed on official website excelrice.co.th
companies.product_summary: 25+ years export experience. All types of Thai rice including White Rice 5%. Factory in Chachoengsao.
companies.notes: Certified by Bureau Veritas. Strong quality credentials. Factory at Bangnampreaw, Chachoengsao.

companies.name_th: ไทยลี การเกษตร จำกัด
companies.product_summary: Happy Buddha and Sunlee brands. #1 Jasmine Rice brand in USA. Also exports White Rice grades.
companies.notes: Global reputation. Strong brand presence. TFPA member.

companies.name_th: ไรซ์แลนด์ ฟู้ดส์ จำกัด
companies.product_summary: Established 1982. Top 10 Thai rice exporter. White Rice, Jasmine, Parboiled.
companies.notes: 40+ years experience. Sinn Sathorn Tower office. Key markets: China, Africa.

companies.name_th: สยามเกรน จำกัด
companies.product_summary: Thai White Rice 5%, 10%, Parboiled Rice. TREA member.
companies.notes: Mid-to-large exporter with regular China shipments.

companies.name_en: Thai Rice and Food Co., Ltd.
companies.name_th: ไทย ไรซ์ แอนด์ ฟู้ด จำกัด
companies.product_summary: Commodity trader. Rice, wheat, soybean meal, corn, sugar. White rice all grades.
companies.notes: Lake Rajada Office Complex. Also trades wheat, corn, sugar — large commodity desk.

companies.name_th: วรรณภพ จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Inferred from domain. Check wonnapob.com/contact-us.html for confirmed email.
companies.product_summary: Manufacturer and exporter. Thai White Rice, Jasmine, Glutinous, Brown rice. Vitamin enriched rice specialist.
companies.notes: Specializes in vitamin-enriched rice. Professional manufacturer-exporter.

companies.name_th: ศิริ อินเตอร์เนชั่นแนล จำกัด
companies.email_notes: Inferred from domain. Check siriinternational.com contact page. 20+ year company based in Chiang Rai.
companies.product_summary: 20+ years experience. Thai Hom Mali, White Rice, Sticky Rice. Northern Thailand mill.
companies.notes: Upper Northern Thailand rice mill. Also operates logistics and import-export subsidiaries.

companies.email_notes: Inferred from domain. Check thai-ricepremiumgrainsexport.com/contact-us/ for confirmed email.
companies.product_summary: Premium Thai rice exports. White Rice 5%, Jasmine, Parboiled grades.
companies.notes: Smaller exporter. Include for competitive pricing comparison.
